female_on_time = shipping |>
  filter(Gender == 'F') |>
  filter(Reached.on.Time_Y.N == 1) |>
  group_by(Warehouse_block) |>
  summarise(avg_F_ontime_cust_rat = mean(Customer_rating))
female_on_time
# A tibble: 5 × 2
  Warehouse_block avg_F_ontime_cust_rat
  <chr>                           <dbl>
1 A                                2.97
2 B                                2.90
3 C                                3.03
4 D                                2.99
5 F                                2.89

Q2

e1 = shipping |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c(France, Spain),
               names_to = 'shipping_transaction_country') |>
  filter(value == 1) |>
  select(-value)
e1
# A tibble: 10,999 × 14
       X    ID Warehouse_block Mode_of_Shipment Customer_care_calls
   <int> <int> <chr>           <chr>                          <int>

10    10    10 B               Flight                             3

#   Prior_purchases <int>, Product_importance <chr>, Gender <chr>,
#   Discount_offered <int>, Weight_in_gms <int>, Reached.on.Time_Y.N <int>,
#   shipping_transaction_country <chr>

Q3

plot = shipping |>
  ggplot(aes(Weight_in_gms, Cost_of_the_Product, color = Mode_of_Shipment)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth(method = 'lm') +
  facet_wrap(~Warehouse_block) +
  theme_bw()
plot
`geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
